title: First Week of Iran War Cost More Than $11 Billion, Pentagon Tells Congress
summary_full: In a Capitol Hill briefing, officials gave their most comprehensive assessment of the cost of the first six days of the war, but the number omitted several aspects of the operation.
summary_public: In a Capitol Hill briefing, officials gave their most comprehensive assessment of the cost of the first six days of the war, but the number omitted several aspects of the operation.

IR.label: negative
